title_en: Hidden Dangers: US Food Additives Exposed!
title_es: ¡Peligros Ocultos: Aditivos Alimenticios en EE. UU. Expuestos!
hook_en: Did you know this harmful additive is banned in Europe but not in the US?
hook_es: ¿Sabías que este aditivo dañino está prohibido en Europa pero no en EE. UU.?
key_message: Many food additives banned in other countries are still allowed in the US, posing potential health risks.
visual_elements: Close-up of a food label with highlighted additives
Split screen: US vs. EU food label comparison
Chart showing increase in US obesity rates over time
_source_regulation_context:
KEY REGULATORY EVENTS:
  • 1938: Federal Food, Drug, and Cosmetic Act — FDA gains enforcement power — Impact: Required safety evidence for new drugs but food additives still loosely regulated

US OBESITY RATES OVER TIME:
  • 1960: 13.4% (adults), 5.0% (children)
  • 1980: 15.0% (adults), 5.5% (children)
  • 1994: 22.5% (adults), 10.0% (children)
  • 2000: 30.5% (adults), 13.9% (children)
  • 2010: 35.7% (adults), 16.9% (children)
  • 2016: 39.8% (adults), 18.5% (children)
  • 2020: 41.9% (adults), 19.7% (children)
  • 2024: 43.0% (adults), 21.0% (children)

title_en: Why US Food Regulations Need an Update!
title_es: ¡Por Qué las Regulaciones Alimentarias de EE. UU. Necesitan una Actualización!
hook_en: US food laws are stuck in the past. Here's why it matters...
hook_es: Las leyes alimentarias de EE. UU. están atrapadas en el pasado. Aquí te explico por qué importa...
key_message: The Federal Food, Drug, and Cosmetic Act of 1938 needs modernization to better protect consumers.
visual_elements: List of outdated laws on a chalkboard
Modern kitchen setup with fresh ingredients
props_needed: Variety of fresh fruits and vegetables
